notes_for_human_reviewer: Floor submission — the over-escalation novice. Trips nearly every cap at once. No three tests applied (three_tests cap → 2, but floors lower because it is pure reflex). Jumps straight to the CISO and T. Adeyemi AND routes around R. (ladder cap → 2, channel cap → 1). No structured packet — vague accusation, no dates/impact/ask/options (packet cap → 2). Catastrophising language throughout ('disaster', 'catastrophe', 'unacceptable', 'crisis', 'failing') AND personal blame of named individuals ('Vantage's PM has been lying', 'the Federation lead has been covering for him') — tone cap → 1 (both present). Proposes to send the email directly to the PMO/sponsor treating the cc to R. as notification, and weaponises the T. Adeyemi offer as a direct channel — channel_and_followthrough floors at 1. All five dims floor at 1.
